description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to build PasswordSafe with CMake on macOS. The workflow should trigger on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and allow manual triggering. It should use a macOS job with read permissions, setting up the environment, installing dependencies, building libyubikey and ykpers from upstream, caching and building wxWidgets, generating Xcode project with CMake, building PasswordSafe, running tests, creating a DMG, and uploading it as an artifact.
